title: echinochloa crus-galli subsp. hostii
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli subsp. hostii, also known as Japanese barnyard grass, is a subspecies of grass that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Echinochloa crus-galli subsp. hostii include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and stems, which can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions.
